productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarglide Grey Sports Shoes
description: A spin off of the classic nike LunarGlide, the LunarGlide+ 3 running shoe offers absolute cushioned comfort, better Fit and dynamic support. Perfect for under pronators and moderate over pronators, the Dynamic Support platform in the midsole adapts to the runner's varying stride and offers on-demand support. UpperBreathable mesh upper for ample ventilation and reduced irritationInner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfortExtended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfoot and heelSymmetrical lace-up system for a snug fitMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortPerforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for a comfortable, snug fitMidsoleLunarlon midsole - lighter and more responsive than PhylonFitSole cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionDynamic Support system to adapt to your stridePadded footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleEnvironmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityCarbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistanceWaffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
